description:
Maqraa turns reading real Arabic books into a game you can win.

Pick a book from a curated path of Islamic classics, Arabic literature, and graded readers. Read page by page, tap any word for an instant translation, and save the words you want to keep. Saved words come back as spaced-repetition flashcards timed so you review them right before you forget.

Finish a chapter and take a quick comprehension quiz. Finish a book and prove it with a whole-book test, graded with per-question feedback in Arabic. Every page, word, and test earns XP, builds your streak, and unlocks achievements.

HOW IT WORKS
- Tap-to-translate: tap any word while reading for the meaning, part of speech, and an example sentence
- Review deck: saved words become flashcards scheduled with spaced repetition
- Chapter quizzes and whole-book comprehension tests with instant grading
- XP, streaks, daily goals, and achievements keep you consistent
- A curated path from fully vocalized beginner texts to classical prose

FREE AND PRO
Reading beginner books, saving words, and reviewing are free. Maqraa Pro unlocks intermediate and advanced books, an unlimited review deck, and much higher daily AI limits.

Your progress syncs with maqraa.app, so you can read on your phone and review at your desk.

Maqraa Pro is an auto-renewable subscription (monthly or yearly). Payment is charged to your Apple ID; it renews automatically unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the period ends, and you can manage or cancel it in your App Store settings.

Terms of Use (EULA): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
Privacy Policy: https://maqraa.app/privacy
promotionalText: Read real Arabic books with tap-to-translate, spaced-repetition vocabulary, and comprehension tests that prove you understood.
